summary: Completed UX and clarity pass testing for CQC audit-readiness compliance portal. All 7 features verified successfully: FormEditorPage loads correctly for imported forms showing 'Imported Document' info box, Forms tab renamed to 'Internal Forms (Admin)' with helper text, Checklist uses standardized status badges (Missing/Evidence Uploaded/Verified), Dashboard shows 'Fully Verified' metric with green styling, and checklist actions follow correct order (Upload→View→Download→Verify).
passed_tests: Dashboard: 'Fully Verified' metric card visible with green (bg-success) styling
Dashboard: 'Fully Verified' shows 'Ready for audit' helper text when value > 0
Employee Profile: Forms tab renamed to 'Internal Forms (Admin)'
Employee Profile: Forms tab shows helper text 'Forms are internal workflows. Completed forms generate PDF evidence stored in the checklist.'
FormEditorPage: Loads correctly for imported forms (Reference 1) without crashing
FormEditorPage: Shows 'Imported Document' info box with text 'This document was imported from an existing file. The original document is stored as evidence.'
Checklist: Status badges use standardized language - 'Evidence Uploaded' (blue), 'Verified' (green)
Checklist: No old status names found as badges (Complete, In Progress, Pending, No Evidence)
Checklist: Actions in correct order - Add File → View → Download → Verify
Checklist: View and Download buttons present for items with evidence (19 each)
Checklist: Verify buttons present for unverified items with evidence (16)
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee Olakunle Alonge (OCS-0001). Employee has 23/23 requirements complete with 5/23 verified. Reference 1 form is an imported document.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UX cleanup pass verified. All status badges now use standardized language: Missing (red), Evidence Uploaded (blue), Verified (green). Forms tab renamed to 'Internal Forms (Admin)' with helper text explaining PDF evidence generation. FormEditorPage gracefully handles imported forms without templates by showing 'Imported Document' info box. Dashboard has 'Fully Verified' metric with green styling. Note: 'Documents Pending' in employee header is the onboarding status, not a checklist badge - this is correct behavior.
